flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Southwestern Adventist University rose 50% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.7k → $10.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southwestern Adventist University fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (689 → 570).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southwestern Adventist University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (45.5% → 52.3%).
